blogs.title: ATM Machine - LLD
blogs.description: Low-level design of an ATM system covering card authentication, account management, transactions, withdrawal/deposit, balance inquiry, and security
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Meeting Scheduler - LLD
blogs.description: Low-level design of a meeting scheduler system covering calendar management, conflict detection, room booking, and invite management with Java
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Tic-Tac-Toe Game - LLD
blogs.description: Low-level design of a Tic-Tac-Toe game with OOP covering board management, players, game state, move validation, and win detection
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Elevator System - LLD
blogs.description: Low-level design of an elevator system with multiple elevators, request handling, and scheduling algorithms including FCFS, SCAN, and LOOK
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Parking Lot System - LLD
blogs.description: Low-level design of a parking lot system with OOP principles covering vehicle types, parking spots, levels, payment processing, and entry/exit management
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Concurrency Patterns in Java
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to concurrency patterns in Java covering thread safety, locks, semaphores, producer-consumer, reader-writer, and dining philosophers
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: GoF Design Patterns
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to Gang of Four design patterns covering Creational, Structural, and Behavioral patterns with Java examples and class diagrams
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: UML Diagrams for System Design
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to UML diagrams for system design covering Class, Sequence, Activity, State, and Use Case diagrams with Mermaid examples
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: OOP & SOLID Principles
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to Object-Oriented Programming pillars and SOLID principles with Java examples for building maintainable software systems
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari
